notes: SHIP v1.14.233 — FORGE HYBRID AISLE v2.9.2 INTEGRATION, Ship 1 (read-only aisle over the REAL Master). Replaces the old procedural forge3d_* Stage-1 scene (was lines 17431-17905) with the John-locked v2.9.2 vanilla-three.js surface, ported into dct-ios.html as a disposable module. WHAT LANDS: (1) the photoreal CoreWeave plate aisle (FACE_B64 inline webp, hash-verified 539aae50/fe73b6ac intact) — layer-split 'photo is photo, data is data', schematic guts drawn into the locked GUT window {0.1046,0.9041,0.108,0.932}; (2) LOADOUT model — pick up to 5 racks (⊞ picker, full Master grouped by row) → 3D renders exactly those; chip strip + focus/walk (PREV/CLOSE/NEXT), tap-to-focus / tap-focused-to-open; (3) full-Master SEARCH (rack ids, hostnames, types); (4) a read-only VERIFY/detail panel (SLOT · COMPONENT · STATUS). ALL DATA IS REAL: racks from master.racksByCab, slots via master_rackToElevation, type mapped from master_hostType vocab (sw->switch, pwr->pdu, stor->storage, cpu->server, cdu->pdu, fw->switch, other->blank). HONESTY-LOCK (no fabricated status): phantom_node_status_v1 does not exist yet, so every slot renders 'present' (solid); NO racked/pending counts, fill bars, or toggles are shown — detail STATUS column reads em-dash, hint says 'STATUS TRACKING — SHIP 2', footer shows COMPONENTS only. The verify writeback (tap->racked/pending->persist->rebake) is SHIP 2, GATED on decision D2 (status precedence: field-verify beats import, conflicts flagged never silent). LIFECYCLE: the mock owned the whole window with no teardown; rebuilt as forge3d_render(mount) with a full teardown (cancel rAF, remove all window listeners tracked in _cleanup[], dispose renderer+bakedTex+gutTextures+geoms, forceContextLoss) wired to mount._forge3dDispose + _forge3dActive; single-GL-context invariant preserved vs _reh3dActive. Reuses the app's SW-precached ./vendor/three.min.js (D3 resolved by precedent — forge3d_ensure3D already lazy-loaded it; NO +603KB inline). Entry points keep the forge3d_open/close/ensure3D/render names (SYS->FORGE 3D door @12154 + sheet ✕ untouched). HUD re-homed under #forge3d-sheet as #forge3d-hud (mock hud-top brand dropped — the app's .rd-sheet-hdr already brands+closes); ALL HUD CSS scoped under '#forge3d-sheet ' (keyframe renamed fx-pulse) so nothing leaks; body.rd-only, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (all new markup/CSS/JS is redesign-gated or additive, legacy never reaches #forge3d-sheet). Persistence keys deploy_forge_loadout_v1 / deploy_forge_view_v1 (UI prefs, try/catch-guarded); NO fabricated status persistence. Tap uses canvas getBoundingClientRect (handles the sheet-header offset the mock's innerWidth math ignored). JUDGMENT CALLS: hud-top brand dropped (dup w/ sheet header); chip fill bars + picker fill bars removed (would imply fabricated status); picker shows component count 'N CMP'. Gates: node --check all inline script blocks + sw.js, CSS braces balanced, CRLF+BOM preserved, three-stamp .231->.233 (.232 was the reverted dimmer HUD). DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John iPhone): (1) SYS->FORGE 3D opens the aisle; real rack ids from the loaded Master appear (not fake c1:001 demo); (2) ⊞ picker lists the whole Master by row, pick up to 5 -> APPLY -> those 5 render photoreal front with legible schematic guts; (3) tap a flank rack = focus slide + camera drift; tap focused rack = detail panel (SLOT/COMPONENT list, STATUS = em-dash, hint 'SHIP 2'); PREV/NEXT walk the loadout; (4) search finds racks+hostnames across the whole Master; (5) drag orbits / pinch zooms ONLY on the canvas (chips/panels scroll without rotating); (6) CLOSE (sheet ✕) then re-open several times — no GPU-context crash, no doubled listeners, scene rebuilds clean (single-GL-context teardown); (7) rotate -> still frames; (8) ?legacy=1 -> Forge door/scene absent, legacy unchanged. Ship 1 = read-only aisle; Ship 2 (verify writeback) waits on John green-light + D2. Batch-verify: this is a NEW feature ship on the .231-verified base.
